---
title: "transformer-plus-features-740 — notes"
date: 2026-05-18
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
jupyter: python3
---

# transformer-plus-features-740

Combining MinimalTransformer (arch lever) with 80-dim per-player features
(data lever) via per-slot `Linear(8, d_model)` injection. See `README.md`
for the hypothesis and `metrics_*.json` for results.

## Load metrics

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path

exp = Path(".").resolve()
metrics_arch = json.loads((exp / "metrics_architecture_only.json").read_text()) \
    if (exp / "metrics_architecture_only.json").exists() else None
metrics_prim = json.loads((exp / "metrics_transformer_plus_features.json").read_text()) \
    if (exp / "metrics_transformer_plus_features.json").exists() else None

print("architecture_only val_auc:",
      metrics_arch and metrics_arch.get("val_auc"))
print("transformer_plus_features val_auc:",
      metrics_prim and metrics_prim.get("val_auc"))
```

## Learning curves

Plots are saved under `results/learning_curve_<ablation>.png` by `train.py`.
Embed inline if useful for the write-up.

## Coverage-bucket val_auc

Compare `coverage_bucket_val_auc.buckets.high.val_auc` between the two
ablations. The hypothesis predicts a lift in the HIGH-coverage tercile when
features are injected — that's where per-player skill information is most
discriminative.

## Anchors

- `plateau_baseline_740_val_auc`: 0.6161 (LightGBM, hero-one-hot only)
- `plateau_architectures_740_val_auc`: 0.6322 (MinimalTransformer, no features)
- `transformer_hp_sweep_740_val_auc`: 0.6318 (best HP-tuned MinimalTransformer)
- `player_features_prepatch_740_features_only_val_auc`: 0.6256 (LightGBM + 80 player feats)
- `proposal_target_val_auc`: 0.6372 (architecture_only + 0.005)
